title: Keladi Kanmani Lyrics Puthu Puthu Arthangal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Keladi Kanmani
paadagan sangadhi
nee idhai ketpadhaal
nenjil orr nimmadhi

naal muludhum paarvayil
naan ezhudhum
por kadhayai unakena
naan koora.

ennaalum naan yaerem
..
pirarkkaaga naan paadum
thirai paadalthaan

innaalil thaney naan
isaithaen ammaa
enakkaaga naan paadum
mudhal paadal thaan

naan pota poomaalai
manam serkkavillai
neethaaney enakkaaga
madal pooththa mullai.

Keladi Kanmani
paadagan sangadhi
nee idhai ketpadhaal
nenjil orr nimmadhi

naan vaadum neram
un maarpodu thaan
nee ennai
thaalaattum
thaai allavaaa.

kaal pona paadhaigal
naan pona podhu
kai serthu neethaney
mei sertha maadhu.

Keladi Kanmani
paadagan sangadhi
nee idhai ketpadhaal
nenjil orr nimmadhi

naal muludhum paarvayil
naan ezhudhum
por kadhayai unakena
naan koora.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Keladi Kanmani?

The song is a romantic and soothing melody that evokes feelings of love and nostalgia.

Who composed the music for Puthu Puthu Arthangal?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

Who sang Keladi Kanmani?

The song was sung by the renowned playback singer S.P. Balasubramaniam.

What is the significance of the song in the movie?

The song captures the emotional depth and romantic essence of the film's narrative.

When was Puthu Puthu Arthangal released?

The movie was released in the year 1989.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Keladi Kanmani from Puthu Puthu Arthangal is a beautiful romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by S.P. Balasubramaniam, the song is a soothing and nostalgic piece that resonates with the listener's emotions. Ilaiyaraaja's composition, combined with Vaali's heartfelt lyrics, creates a timeless classic that remains etched in the hearts of Tamil music lovers. The song plays a significant role in the movie, enhancing the emotional depth of the storyline.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless charm of Keladi Kanmani from the movie Puthu Puthu Arthangal. This classic melody, beautifully rendered by S.P. Balasubramaniam, is a testament to Ilaiyaraaja's musical genius. Dive into a world of romance and nostalgia with Vaali's poignant lyrics.
stanzaMeanings: Listen, dear, when you hear the singer's story, it brings peace to the heart.
All day long, I write a war story with my eyes, just to tell you.
I always climb up, singing for others is my screen song.
Today, I sang for myself, this is my first song for me.
The thirst that couldn't be quenched by mirage water was satisfied by the Ganges water.
The garland I made didn't reach the heart, but you bloomed a jasmine for me.
Listen, dear, when you hear the singer's story, it brings peace to the heart.
The burden that doesn't leave my heart, aren't you the one I search for to carry it?
When I wither, you are the mother who cradles me on your chest.
Some joyful tune plays only because of you.
When I walk the old paths, you are the one who holds my hand and guides me.
Listen, dear, when you hear the singer's story, it brings peace to the heart.
All day long, I write a war story with my eyes, just to tell you.
